Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Deepstriders]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Deepstriders are Kameira of the sea that can command the motion of water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — A baby Deepstrider is a juvenile Kameira of the sea with blue scales.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Alchemists claim to offer the fortitude of a Deepstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Deepstriders are huge, blue-scaled leviathans with mouths like dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — The Deepstrider within Meia is impatient for combat and prefers overwhelming force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — Deepstriders are sea serpents that once made long-distance sea travel impossible.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — Deepstriders have blue scales.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — Deepstriders have solid blue eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — Deepstriders growl with a sound deep enough to shake the water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Deepstrider is a type of Kameira.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
